overall.description: A static cinematic view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a wide river with a red bridge on the left, dense high-rise buildings in the background, and a cluttered waterfront shantytown on the right. The scene features industrial smokestacks emitting white smoke against a clear blue sky with no camera movement or action occurring throughout the clip.

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from a fixed vantage point overlooking the river

entered.detail: large red suspension bridge spanning the river with visible structural cables
wide murky brown river with gentle ripples reflecting the sky
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke plumes into the sky
futuristic high-rise towers with glass facades and neon accents including a distinctive orange building
dense cluster of low-rise makeshift buildings and structures along the riverbank with colorful rooftops

segments.scene_description: A completely static panoramic view of a cyberpunk city waterfront. The red bridge spans the left side of the river while futuristic glass skyscrapers rise in the background. Industrial smokestacks emit white plumes among the high-rises, and a dense shantytown clusters along the right riverbank. The camera remains motionless throughout, capturing the vivid colors and detailed architecture of the game environment with no movement or events occurring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront, preserving a singular, frozen perspective of the city's industrial scale. It begins with a wide gaze across a river where a prominent red bridge spans the left side, leading the eye toward a backdrop of towering glass skyscrapers. As the view lingers, the focus encompasses industrial smokestacks emitting white plumes that drift against a clear blue sky. The scene then extends to the right riverbank, revealing a dense, cluttered shantytown that contrasts with the sleek architecture of the high-rises. Finally, the camera remains motionless, holding this vivid composition of urban decay and futuristic grandeur without any shift in perspective.
